title: Claude's Voice Mode Just Got Smarter
excerpt: Claude's voice mode hasn't been the most reliable, but this update should help.
content_html:
And you can connect it to apps like Gmail and Slack.

Anthropic

Since last year, Anthropic has offered a voice mode through Claude, allowing you to speak to its chatbot instead of writing out your prompts. If I had to guess, most people probably don't know Claude has voice input. However, for those that have used it, the consensus has been that it could use work. One issue is that before today Anthropic routed voice mode queries through Haiku, its smallest model, to reduce latency. That meant voice mode worked well enough for simple questions, but could struggle with more complicated requests. Today, Anthropic is releasing an update to address that complaint.

Now when you use voice mode, it can turn to the company's Sonnet and Opus models for help. Provided you pay for Claude access, the tool will default to the last system you used for text chat. You can also switch between Haiku, Sonnet or Opus mid-conversation through the model picker. "Voice mode uses the fastest version of whichever model you've selected, so the conversation runs smoothly," Anthropic notes. Additionally, voice mode can now pull context from connected apps such as Gmail and Slack, as long as you grant Claude permission to do so.

An Anthropic spokesperson told Engadget voice mode uses a turn-based architecture, so all interactions will see Claude listen to you, pause to think and then respond. It's not fully duplex like OpenAI's new GPT-Live system, which can simultaneously process speech and generate an output. In practice, that should make talking to Claude feel less natural than ChatGPT. Another limitation of Claude's voice mode is that it can't automatically detect the language you're speaking in if you decide to switch languages mid-conversation. You need to either tell it out loud you're about to switch or select the language you're about to speak in from the voice settings menu. However, Anthropic has added support for additional languages, including Indonesian.

"This release is focused on intelligence and tool access," Anthropic told Engadget. "We're continuing to invest in voice and we'll have more to share later this year."

Anthropic is rolling out the new voice mode in beta to all users across its desktop and mobile apps, as well as web client. If you're using Claude through a free account, Anthropic will limit you to a single connection and your prompts will all go through Haiku, though you can speak to Claude in all of the languages voice mode now supports.

sentences.zh: Anthropic 的一位发言人告诉 Engadget，语音模式采用回合制架构，因此所有互动都会看到克劳德在听你说话，停下来思考，然后做出回应。

sentences.zh: 它不像 OpenAI 的新 GPT-Live 系统那样完全双工，后者可以同时处理语音并生成输出。

sentences.en: In practice, that should make talking to Claude feel less natural than ChatGPT.
sentences.zh: 实际上，这应该会让与 Claude 的交谈感觉不如 ChatGPT 自然。

sentences.en: Another limitation of Claude's voice mode is that it can't automatically detect the language you're speaking in if you decide to switch languages mid-conversation.
sentences.zh: 克劳德语音模式的另一个限制是，如果您决定在对话中切换语言，它无法自动检测您正在使用的语言。

sentences.en: You need to either tell it out loud you're about to switch or select the language you're about to speak in from the voice settings menu.
sentences.zh: 您需要大声告诉它您要切换，或者从语音设置菜单中选择您要说话的语言。

sentences.en: However, Anthropic has added support for additional languages, including Indonesian.
sentences.zh: 然而，Anthropic 增加了对其他语言的支持，包括印度尼西亚语。

blocks.html_en: "This release is focused on intelligence and tool access," Anthropic told Engadget. "We're continuing to invest in voice and we'll have more to share later this year."

sentences.zh: “这个版本的重点是情报和工具访问，”Anthropic 告诉 Engadget。

sentences.en: "We're continuing to invest in voice and we'll have more to share later this year."
sentences.zh: “我们将继续投资语音领域，今年晚些时候我们将分享更多内容。”

blocks.html_en: Anthropic is rolling out the new voice mode in beta to all users across its desktop and mobile apps, as well as web client. If you're using Claude through a free account, Anthropic will limit you to a single connection and your prompts will all go through Haiku, though you can speak to Claude in all of the languages voice mode now supports.

sentences.en: Anthropic is rolling out the new voice mode in beta to all users across its desktop and mobile apps, as well as web client.
sentences.zh: Anthropic 正在其桌面和移动应用程序以及 Web 客户端上向所有用户推出新的测​​试版语音模式。

sentences.en: If you're using Claude through a free account, Anthropic will limit you to a single connection and your prompts will all go through Haiku, though you can speak to Claude in all of the languages voice mode now supports.
sentences.zh: 如果您通过免费帐户使用 Claude，Anthropic 会将您限制为单个连接，并且您的提示将全部通过 Haiku 进行，尽管您可以使用语音模式现在支持的所有语言与 Claude 交谈。

content_html_zh:
您还可以将其连接到 Gmail 和 Slack 等应用程序。

人择

自去年以来，Anthropic 通过 Claude 提供了一种语音模式，允许您与其聊天机器人交谈，而不是写下提示。 如果我不得不猜测，大多数人可能不知道克劳德有语音输入。 然而，对于那些使用过它的人来说，共识是它可以使用工作。 一个问题是，在今天之前，Anthropic 通过 Haiku（其最小的模型）路由语音模式查询，以减少延迟。 这意味着语音模式对于简单的问题来说足够有效，但对于更复杂的请求可能会遇到困难。 今天，Anthropic 发布了一个更新来解决该投诉。

现在，当您使用语音模式时，它可以转向该公司的 Sonnet 和 Opus 模型寻求帮助。 如果您为 Claude 访问付费，该工具将默认使用您用于文本聊天的最后一个系统。 您还可以通过模型选择器在对话中切换俳句、十四行诗或作品。 “语音模式使用您选择的模型中最快的版本，因此对话可以顺利进行，”Anthropic 指出。 此外，语音模式现在可以从 Gmail 和 Slack 等连接的应用程序中提取上下文，只要您授予 Claude 这样做的权限即可。

Anthropic 的一位发言人告诉 Engadget，语音模式采用回合制架构，因此所有互动都会看到克劳德在听你说话，停下来思考，然后做出回应。 它不像 OpenAI 的新 GPT-Live 系统那样完全双工，后者可以同时处理语音并生成输出。 实际上，这应该会让与 Claude 的交谈感觉不如 ChatGPT 自然。 克劳德语音模式的另一个限制是，如果您决定在对话中切换语言，它无法自动检测您正在使用的语言。 您需要大声告诉它您要切换，或者从语音设置菜单中选择您要说话的语言。 然而，Anthropic 增加了对其他语言的支持，包括印度尼西亚语。

“这个版本的重点是情报和工具访问，”Anthropic 告诉 Engadget。 “我们将继续投资语音领域，今年晚些时候我们将分享更多内容。”

Anthropic 正在其桌面和移动应用程序以及 Web 客户端上向所有用户推出新的测​​试版语音模式。 如果您通过免费帐户使用 Claude，Anthropic 会将您限制为单个连接，并且您的提示将全部通过 Haiku 进行，尽管您可以使用语音模式现在支持的所有语言与 Claude 交谈。
